description_or_examples: Fuel burned in fixed equipment (boilers, heaters, kilns, engines).
Direct emissions from physical/chemical processes (not fuel combustion).
Refrigerant leaks from AC/refrigeration equipment; methane leakage from gas transport.
Emissions from generating purchased electricity used by the institution.
Emissions from incineration/landfill of institutional solid waste.
Emissions related to purchased water supply and use.
Emissions from commuting by students and employees.
